name: Rally Master
criteria: Players sustain a rally of 8 or more consecutive shots without an error
gemini_reason: The players sustained a rally of 14 shots, which is well above the 8-shot requirement for this badge.

name: Two Up Pressure
criteria: Both partners advance to the kitchen line together and win the point with coordinated net play
gemini_reason: Bill and his partner both advanced to the kitchen line and maintained pressure to win the point.

name: Kitchen King
criteria: Player executes 3 or more quality dinks at the kitchen line in a single rally
gemini_reason: Bill executes 3 quality dinks during the rally at 00:11, 00:15, and 00:18.

name: New Look
criteria: Awarded by the app when a player unlocks a bronze avatar drop from earning a badge

name: Speed Up Specialist
criteria: Player successfully speeds up a dink rally with a well-timed attack that wins the point or creates an advantage
gemini_reason: Lite successfully speeds up the dink rally with a well-timed attack that leads to winning the point.

name: Hustler
criteria: Player visibly gives full effort chasing down a difficult ball, even if they don't win the point
gemini_reason: Bill shows great effort chasing down a difficult overhead smash at 00:09.

name: Paddle Tap Celebration
criteria: Players tap paddles together with their partner after winning a point
gemini_reason: Bill taps paddles with his partner after winning the point.

name: Good Game
criteria: Players from both teams shake hands, fist bump, or show mutual respect after a point or at the end of a game
gemini_reason: Players from both teams meet at the net to shake hands and tap paddles after the point.

name: Spin Doctor
criteria: Player spins their paddle in their hand between points in a showy fashion
gemini_reason: Bill spins his paddle in a showy fashion before the point starts at 00:03.

name: Dance Break
description: Bust a move on the court
criteria: Player busts out a quick dance move between points or after scoring
gemini_reason: The player performs a celebratory dance after his successful shot and boss defeat.

name: Bronze Level Up
description: Ranked up within the Bronze tier
criteria: Awarded when a player ranks up to a Bronze or Iron division
gemini_reason: Backfill: reached Bronze III

name: Transition Zone Warrior
criteria: Player hits a winning shot or effective reset while stuck in the transition zone between baseline and kitchen
gemini_reason: Bill executed an effective reset while positioned in the transition zone at 00:07, allowing his team to stabilize the point.

name: Fist Pump
criteria: Player does an enthusiastic fist pump celebration after a good play
gemini_reason: The player performs an enthusiastic fist pump as part of his celebration.

name: Point to the Sky
criteria: Player points to the sky after scoring or making a great play
gemini_reason: The player points his club and arm toward the sky in celebration after scoring.

name: Body Bagger
criteria: Player speeds up directly at the opponent's body, jamming them and winning the point
gemini_reason: Bill hits a hard drive directly at Michael, striking them and winning the point at 00:17.

name: Victory Spin
criteria: Player jumps and does a 360 degree spin as a celebration
gemini_reason: The player jumps and performs a 360-degree spin as part of his celebration.

name: Clip Creator
description: Created your first highlight through the app
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user creates their first highlight via the app interface

name: Drop Volley Touch
criteria: Player hits a soft drop volley off a hard shot that dies in the kitchen
gemini_reason: Team Right executed a perfect soft drop volley off a hard drive, which completely changed the dynamic of the point.

name: First Session
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user starts their very first session

name: Game On
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user completes their very first session

name: First Share
description: Shared highlights for the first time
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user shares a highlight, highlight group, or all match highlights for the first time

name: Lob Perfecto
criteria: Player hits a lob from a defensive position that pushes both opponents back from the net
gemini_reason: Hit a high, deep lob from a defensive position that successfully pushed opponents off the net.

name: Button Masher
description: Created your first highlight with a bluetooth button
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user creates their first highlight via a bluetooth button click

name: On Fire
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user plays sessions on 3 consecutive days

name: Social Butterfly
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user has played matches against 5 unique opponents

name: Night Owl
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user plays a session that starts after 10 PM local time

name: Early Bird
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user plays a session that starts before 7 AM local time

name: Rare Find
description: Earned a rare badge (top 10% of players)
criteria: Awarded by the app when a player earns a badge that fewer than 10% of players have

name: Paddle Flip
description: Show off with a paddle toss
criteria: Player tosses their paddle in the air and catches it cleanly
gemini_reason: Bill tosses and catches his paddle after winning the point at 00:18.

name: Chest Bump
criteria: Players chest bump their teammate as a celebration
gemini_reason: Bill celebrates winning the point with a chest bump with his partner.

name: Steady Eddie
criteria: Player goes through the entire clip without making an unforced error
gemini_reason: Bill participated in the rally without committing any unforced errors.

name: Third Shot Drop Artist
criteria: Player executes a third shot drop that lands softly in the kitchen and allows their team to advance to the net
gemini_reason: Bill executes a perfect third shot drop from the baseline that lands softly in the kitchen at 00:08.

name: Serve Returner
criteria: Player hits a deep return of serve that pushes the serving team back and prevents an easy third shot
gemini_reason: Bill hits a deep and effective return of serve at 00:10 that puts pressure on the server.

name: Fresh Fit
criteria: Awarded by the app when a player unlocks a silver avatar drop from earning a badge

name: Crowd Pleaser
criteria: A point so entertaining that multiple players visibly react with laughing, clapping, hands on head, or other amazed reactions
gemini_reason: The successful play is met with loud cheers and enthusiastic reactions from everyone watching.

name: Spike!
criteria: The player spikes the ball so fast, the opposing team didn't have time to react, winning the point
gemini_reason: Bill hits a powerful overhead smash that the opponents cannot react to, winning the point.

name: Smart Play
criteria: Player uses deception, misdirection, or tactical intelligence to win a point
gemini_reason: Bill uses a surprise lob during a dink rally to catch the opponent off guard and win the point.

name: Quick Reflexes
criteria: Player reacts to a fast shot with an impressive reflex save or return
gemini_reason: Bill shows quick reflexes to return a fast volley at 00:20 during the net exchange.

name: Reset Wizard
criteria: Player successfully resets a hard-driven ball back into a soft dink, neutralizing the opponent's attack
gemini_reason: Bill successfully resets a hard smash into a soft dink.

name: Iron Wall
criteria: Player makes 3 or more consecutive defensive saves or retrieves that keep them in the point
gemini_reason: Bill makes several consecutive defensive saves against smashes to keep the point alive.

name: Backhand Assassin
criteria: Player hits a backhand shot that wins the point outright with power or placement
gemini_reason: Bill hits a decisive backhand shot that wins the point outright with good placement.

name: Dink Master
criteria: Player hits a dink that is perfectly placed, low over the net, and forces the opponent into a difficult position
gemini_reason: Bill hits several perfectly placed dinks that keep the opponents in a defensive position.

name: Silver Level Up
description: Ranked up within the Silver tier
criteria: Awarded when a player ranks up to a Silver division
gemini_reason: Backfill: reached Silver III

name: Coverage Duo
criteria: Both partners move in sync to cover lobs, dinks, and drives without leaving gaps on the court
gemini_reason: Bill and James move in sync to cover the court during the dink rally.

name: Poach King
criteria: Player crosses into their partner's side to intercept and put away a volley
gemini_reason: Team Near • Right crossed into his partner's side to intercept a dink and initiated the point-winning attack with a speed-up.

name: Regular
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user has completed 10 sessions

name: Weekend Warrior
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user plays at least one session on 4 consecutive weekends

name: Badge Collector
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user has earned 10 different badge types

name: Exclusive Club
description: Earned a very rare badge (top 3% of players)
criteria: Awarded by the app when a player earns a badge that fewer than 3% of players have

name: Century Club
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user has created 100 total highlights

name: One-Handed Backhand
criteria: Player hits a clean one-handed backhand that wins the point
gemini_reason: Bill executes a clean one-handed backhand winner to end the rally.

name: Lob Recovery Duo
criteria: After being lobbed, both partners rotate back and recover the point as a coordinated unit
gemini_reason: Both partners retreated in sync to cover a lob and successfully recovered to win the point.

name: Bandeja Boss
criteria: Player executes a textbook bandeja with proper slice and placement that maintains net position
gemini_reason: Executed a controlled bandeja to counter a lob, allowing his team to maintain their advantageous net position.

name: Stacking Pro
criteria: Team executes a stacking play correctly, switching sides efficiently to keep their preferred positioning
gemini_reason: Mangiaeliza and his partner execute a stacking maneuver, switching sides of the court before the serve is hit.

name: Epic Rally
criteria: Both sides sustain a rally of 15 or more consecutive shots back and forth
gemini_reason: The rally consists of 15 consecutive shots, meeting the criteria for an epic rally.

name: Highlight Reel
criteria: Player makes an exceptional, crowd-pleasing play that would be worthy of a highlight reel
gemini_reason: The sequence of the young player hitting the shot and defeating the boss is an exceptional, crowd-pleasing moment.

name: Tag Team Takedown
criteria: Partners work together over multiple shots to systematically break down the opponents and win the point
gemini_reason: Bill worked together with their partner through multiple smashes to systematically win the point.

name: Firefight Victor
criteria: Player wins a fast hands battle at the kitchen line with quick reflexes and shot selection
gemini_reason: Bill wins a fast hands battle at the kitchen line, defending a speed-up and winning the point when his opponent hits the net.

name: Legendary Look
criteria: Awarded by the app when a player unlocks a gold avatar drop from earning a badge

name: Momentum Shift
description: Changed the energy of the match
criteria: Player makes a play that visibly shifts the momentum or energy of the match
gemini_reason: Player 3's vocal and energetic celebration at 00:18 after a big winner visibly boosts the energy of the match.

name: Gold Level Up
description: Ranked up within the Gold tier
criteria: Awarded when a player ranks up to a Gold division
gemini_reason: Ranked up to Gold III

name: Clutch Performer
criteria: Player executes an excellent shot or play during a high-pressure moment or turning point
gemini_reason: The player executes a successful shot that defeats the Skeleton King boss, a high-pressure moment in the game.

name: Airborne
criteria: Player hits the ball while both feet are off the ground, jumping to make the shot
gemini_reason: Bill jumps off the ground to execute a powerful overhead smash at 00:20.

name: Lob Genius
criteria: Player hits a lob over the opponent's head that lands in and cannot be retrieved
gemini_reason: Bill hits a perfectly placed lob over the opponent's head that lands in for a winner.

name: Tweener
criteria: Player hits a shot between their legs
gemini_reason: Bill executes a perfect between-the-legs shot (tweener) after chasing down a deep lob at 00:16.

name: Erne Machine
criteria: Player jumps around or over the kitchen to hit a volley (an erne)
gemini_reason: For executing a clear and aggressive Erne attempt by jumping around the kitchen.

name: Around the Post
criteria: Player runs wide and hits the ball around the net post from an extreme angle to win the point
gemini_reason: Bill runs wide to their left and hits a winning shot around the net post.

name: Scorpion Tail
description: Behind the back or trick shot
criteria: Player hits a behind the back, between the legs, or other unorthodox trick shot that keeps the rally alive or wins the point
gemini_reason: Bill hits a successful tweener, an unorthodox trick shot, to keep the rally alive.

name: Wall of Hands
criteria: Both partners defend a flurry of speed ups together at the kitchen line, resetting or winning the point as a unit
gemini_reason: Player 3 and his partner defended a series of fast shots at the net together as a unit.

name: Double Reset
criteria: Both partners each reset a hard-driven ball during the same rally, neutralizing sustained pressure
gemini_reason: After being pushed back by a good return and a weak third, both players on the near team successfully hit reset shots to neutralize the attack and get to the kitchen.

name: Top 10
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user's XP ranking places them in the Top 10

name: Thousand Club
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user has created 1,000 total highlights

name: Veteran
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user has completed 50 sessions

name: Iron Streak
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user plays sessions on 7 consecutive days

name: Trophy Case
criteria: Awarded by the app when a user has earned 25 different badge types

name: One of a Kind
description: Earned a legendary badge (top 1% of players)
criteria: Awarded by the app when a player earns a badge that fewer than 1% of players have

name: Net Magnet
criteria: Player hits a shot into the net.
gemini_reason: Bill hits the final shot of the rally into the net.

name: At Least You Showed Up
criteria: Player is visibly present on the court but makes minimal impactful plays during a rally
gemini_reason: Bill is present on the court but only hits the return of serve during the rally.

name: Nice Try
description: You gave it a shot, just... not a great one
criteria: Player attempts a shot that clearly misses or goes way out of bounds but showed effort
gemini_reason: Bill makes a valiant attempt to return a powerful shot at 00:16, but the ball lands out of bounds.

name: Baby Steps
criteria: Player makes a basic but correct shot or play for their skill level
gemini_reason: Bill performs basic, controlled volleys as part of a training drill.

name: Out of Bounds
description: That ball had a flight reservation
criteria: Player hits the ball far out of bounds with excessive force
gemini_reason: Bill hits the final shot of the rally long and out of bounds.

name: That Was Easy
criteria: Smash the big red button in any sort of dramatic or funny fashion
gemini_reason: The player dramatically picks up and prepares to smash the big red 'THAT WAS EASY!' button, which is the entire focus of the clip.
